title: Functions, Scope, and Callable Contracts · Python Build Room
summary: Refactor the routing engine into testable calculations, validators, and reporting functions. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a function-oriented support workflow while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define and call functions with purposeful names, small responsibilities, docstrings, and testable behavior.
Use positional-only, positional-or-keyword, keyword-only, default, variadic positional, and variadic keyword parameters deliberately.
Choose defaults without shared mutable state and distinguish omitted values from explicit None when needed.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
